title: Salty Dutch Lemongrass Stir-Fry
description: A crispy and savory dish with a unique blend of lemongrass stalks that tantalizes the taste buds with its tropical notes, perfect for those who crave something midnight-craving but without compromising their dietary choices.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of shrimp, peeled and deveined
ingredients.notes: use any protein alternative based on your dietary preference

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Gently add lemongrass stalks and cook for another minute to soften slightly.
Push the lemongrass to one side of the skillet and add shrimp to the other half. Cook until opaque and pinked through, about 2-3 minutes per batch if needed.
Sprinkle sesame seeds evenly over shrimp in the skillet. If using fish sauce, stir it into the shrimp mixture now for added flavor.
Stir everything together gently so that all ingredients are coated with the lemongrass aroma and sesame seeds' crunch.
Serve hot as a snack or meal accompaniment.
